name: Persistent memory
description: Agents can preserve user or workspace context across sessions.

name: Tool-rich workspace agents
description: Agents can combine files, email, calendar, browser, and business tools.

name: Open-weight model release
description: A model can be downloaded, adapted, and redistributed outside the original provider boundary.

name: Local risk monitoring
description: A local monitor can classify risk events and optionally submit anonymized telemetry.

name: Agent-on-agent adversarial probing
description: Agents can autonomously probe other agents or models and search for weaknesses without direct human prompt-by-prompt utilization.
